name: Top Tier

description_long: Top Tier's website is currently inaccessible due to a suspended hosting account. The domain (sandyliebhold.com) displays only a generic 'Account Suspended' message with instructions to contact the hosting provider, providing no information about the company's actual business operations, history, or services. Without access to verifiable website content, company documentation, or operational details, it is impossible to accurately assess what financial products or services Top Tier offers, who operates the company, how long they have been in business, or whether they are actively serving consumers. The current categorization as a 'payday-alternative' cannot be confirmed or validated. The suspended status raises significant questions about the company's current legitimacy and active operation in the consumer finance space.
